textByHash.04d42036a815bc611654dfa22d88181635e16053: Great, nice of you to do it for me.
textByHash.0e055fc94fdd4473dcb35a898f018d2c9f715284: Greetings Bwana! My name is Yanni and I buy and sell antiques.
textByHash.1550ffe1df4635f9953e27fa21382ea85f3bfc8d: Very well my friend, let me count out your reward.
textByHash.198a23ba18c5d9d99ddb88b099a834f065a5a18b: Well, I only asked you to do me one small favour...
textByHash.19c8649dc62387108a5c560f62d4ec36a9679257: I'll give you 100 coins for the crumpled scroll...
textByHash.1b475f9225569744ec4efd463b3aea4dc9745de2: Sorry Bwana, you have nothing I am interested in.
textByHash.1fcfd6cfee24dfba0772412714f0f98d958a9865: Tsk....It's only a little job bwana, I ask you to do me one small favour! Go to the jungle forester and get me a piece of red mahogany. It can't be that difficult can it?
textByHash.215dea229f7e70b827a2d5fce46724e6cb8f6d33: That's a great copy of Bervirius notes. Here's 100 coins for it.
textByHash.232ce42d31a6b81ab413ede93b3062659a2880c7: Well, you didn't have to go to so much trouble...
textByHash.2686ebdb663abe880cdc3258e1f621ecde0df2d6: That's a great tattered scroll. Here's 100 coins for it.
textByHash.285b52ead2013b4729147240b0129796d3820834: Sorry, Sir, I have nothing that you need.
textByHash.2f07b0cc32ec85a30a6b3e7ff83c871caff04945: Fair enough, come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.39d760d7f8b413ecc17281267eeecb9e5950a542: Well, if you're bored, you could do me a small favour and nip to see the jungle forester. I need a piece of red mahogany to resurface an antique wardrobe.
textByHash.496589862d9d550ff0919429eecfc3c9851c1bb7: Well, that's absolutely wonderful my friend! Many thanks!
textByHash.4bb2ce16c41e14262da773c2ad8214fa457fac7f: Oh....ok, I guess I could offer you these lamps...I'm not sure what they're worth, but you can have them.
textByHash.4c718627b58ab646f27af5b3fb6a7a397f257dc4: I'll give you 1000 coins for your 'Beads of the Dead'...
textByHash.4d5dbc1b9edbb954aeb1d2a335f1a3884d325cba: Impressive necklace there, here's 1000 coins for it.
textByHash.4f8679e3b9b0445ab12f755dee6d8e2c65b69698: That's a great crumpled scroll. Here's 100 coins for it.
textByHash.51d16bb59f45e43a43335de3c942f64ddf338fba: I'll give you 100 coins for the Stone Plaque...
textByHash.5678dc61a96db59a6ceb39492554fda1d4d20662: That's a great Locating Crystal. Here's 500 coins for it.
textByHash.56eb1f7de68c80010df09dab8806e4b7844652df: And that's the only item I am interested in. If you want to sell me that item, simply show it to me.
textByHash.681cdd299031c3d41554b77f3b063ddab1e23326: That's a great stone-plaque. Here's 100 coins for it.
textByHash.6ea68988fffb6df6bbdc14c5524d19d7f1da511b: Fair enough! Hope it all goes well...but, you know, you looked bored so I just thought I'd suggest it.
textByHash.6f4e39e5369f0c7e6afedd7130a819d03301170c: That's a great bone key. Here's 100 coins for it.
textByHash.6f85cd064ff4c9848849eb8978da6d04aa75375d: Ah you'd like to sell this to me would you? I can offer you 5000 coins!
textByHash.7390313295c141fb55051b25b0c5d5d576000734: I hear that some old timer from the Legends Guild keeps sending new recruits down there..only Zamorak knows why.
textByHash.7925f7a83f74c318cc3041151270985d176b8964: Well...what were you expecting? I mean, it took you so long I could have gone and got it myself!
textByHash.8638b4e5c6d9127236399891cb0958ef737ed676: Huh! You make it sound like a major undertaking! I should have just done it myself!
textByHash.8726f1d5e0161b1f738914fd219e0d4a79395c89: You sound a bit bored of Shilo Village...what's wrong?
textByHash.87438e5e6fc8146385bd7073f0c5e23ffc204540: You're telling me bwana, I was supposed to have this wardrobe finished before now! Hurry it up will you, I don't have all day!
textByHash.8aa246bbad4982e9983dad627bff9a66f3623afc: I'll give you 500 coins for your locating crystal...
textByHash.9415161b34b311c86ef983cb1ed7a9cc1e9396bb: Sure thing. Have a nice day Bwana.
textByHash.9fcc162c470da4e4daaf2f71cd6aa369971b90d0: Would you like me to have a look at your items and give you a quote?
textByHash.a09a5f977727b5166dd14e7f39092c1a9a33d093: They're always trying to find ways into that place.
textByHash.a5920bf2714aba320ef61144d6cfecde50f462bd: I buy antiques and other interesting items. If you have any interesting items that you might want to sell me, please let me see them and I'll offer you a fair price.
textByHash.a8ac84701beac14a2e8127b0ce679f895bbde976: Those are the items I am interested in Bwana. If you want to sell me those items, simply show them to me.
textByHash.a95988b35555777ba2327a7aa0088b97f455e4c8: Well, can't you just do my favour and forget about theirs?
textByHash.aa3f736531460a8caef22562fb0f195a1c289b5d: Oh, sorry, I thought you knew the area. You'll find a jungle forester in between the southern edge of Shilo Village and the Kharazi Jungle.
textByHash.b1db7536e9ea048d61970e0fe09025247112b98f: It's a key ring, you can store some of your most valuable keys on it...helps to keep things organised!
textByHash.d5d0a8f1826c0acb364d1b0a559a0c14ae9f894a: I'll give you 100 coins for the tattered scroll...
textByHash.d76b3b78c6dbb5cbb33479897a27ea0373c4ca2f: Look, I can see that you're quite upset about this...so here, have this.
textByHash.e43c3fb44b4c92466ac935424d20a9d19b2893ac: I'll give you 100 coins for the Bone Key...
textByHash.e7af7cddedddc424d02893be4fa1c3f6307aa55a: Very well my friend, come back if you change your mind.
textByHash.fcd7a926271c8f0ded24bde97cb270fde1a6de31: Sorry, Madam, I have nothing that you need.
